subject: Re-verify the escalation -> hedge-sleeve link - implication computes at ALERT/SEVERE and is rendered into the escalation message

checks.detail: severity=2 action=ADD leg=SPY put spread class=EQUITY_CRASH
severity=3 action=HARVEST should_escalate=True, message carries block=True

verdict: ESCALATION -> HEDGE LINK VERIFIED - the implication computes at ALERT and SEVERE (ADD / HARVEST by tape and standing sleeve), renders into the escalation message whenever the run escalates, reads SWITCH-REVIEW on a class mismatch, and stays null at WATCH. The intraday tripwire now tells the desk exactly what the sleeve move is, not just to look at it.
